name: Oblong Gingham with Hemstitch and Raw Edge Decorative Throw Pillow Camel - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Cotton Cylinder Bolster
description: A great mix of classic meets modern, the Oblong Gingham with Hemstitch and Raw Edge Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee makes a beautiful addition to your home. This oblong throw pillow features a gingham pattern in camel and neutral shades with hemstitch detailing for an elegant look you'll adore. The 100% cotton exterior helps provide a comfy surface to lean back and relax, while the removable cover offers easy maintenance. Decorated with raw fringe along the sides, the gingham throw pillow works well with your everyday decor, or when you're sprucing up your space for a special occasion.
